prompt: 기존에 이메일/비밀번호 로그인만 있던 서비스에 매직링크 로그인을 추가하고 싶어. 로그아웃이랑 비밀번호 재설정 페이지도 같이 점검해줘.
assertions: Auth callback route exists and uses exchangeCodeForSession
Server-side logout via signOut() inside a Server Action exists
Password reset uses resetPasswordForEmail plus a distinct update-password step gated by a valid recovery session
Middleware syncs refreshed cookies onto both request and response
Existing email/password login is preserved alongside the new magic-link option
